name: knot
author: Rakibul Yeasin
description: Persistent memory pool MCP server - eliminate Context Rot with hierarchical knowledge, skill execution, and semantic drift detection

tools.name: save_wisdom
tools.description: Persist a knowledge node to the memory pool with Jit-V verification

tools.name: recall_memory
tools.description: Semantic search with Jit-V verification and ancestry chain

tools.name: save_skill
tools.description: Save a reusable skill procedure with prerequisites and steps

tools.name: execute_skill
tools.description: Execute a saved skill with variable substitution

tools.name: recall_skills
tools.description: Search skills by name or description

tools.name: commit_session
tools.description: Promote session-scope nodes to project scope

tools.name: jit_verify
tools.description: Run Jit-V on a specific node

tools.name: list_nodes
tools.description: List knowledge nodes filtered by scope and tags

tools.name: link_nodes
tools.description: Link two nodes with typed edges

tools.name: knot_status
tools.description: Health check: nodes, skills, ghost count, and database status

tools.name: prune_ghosts
tools.description: [DESTRUCTIVE] Delete Ghost Nodes whose source files no longer exist on disk. Returns count removed.

tools.name: delete_wisdom
tools.description: [DESTRUCTIVE] Permanently remove a memory node. Children are re-parented to the deleted node's parent.

tools.name: delete_skill
tools.description: [DESTRUCTIVE] Remove a saved skill by name. Requires force=true when success_count > 10.
